author: Frosty40
name: Medusa: Canonical FLA DeltaNet + Naive Int6 (GPTQ bypass)
blurb: Successor to PR #990 (ClownCar, 1.1813 BPB). Catalyzed by PR #875 (@shalyhinpavel, GDN 1.0226) — the same chunk_delta_rule mechanism that makes GDN explosive is symbiotic with the crawler topology here. Adds DELTA_NET_HEADS=4, bypasses GPTQ (SKIP_GPTQ=1, which degraded 0.7278→0.9340 in ClownCar_II), and fixes BF16 state dtype recompile bug. 4 flat + 1 crawler × 4 loops, INST_DIM=32, CRAWLER_QUANT_INT8=1. 3-seed mean val_bpb=PENDING.
